items.title: FerryAI
items.summary: Native AI inference for PHP 8.3+ - run ONNX, GGUF (llama.cpp) and RubixML models directly in your PHP process via FFI. Chat, streaming, embeddings, RAG and vector search. No Python, no HTTP microservices, no Docker sidecars.
items.summary_cn: PHP 8.3+的原生AI推理-通过FFI直接在PHP流程中运行ONNX、GGUF (llama.cpp)和RubixML模型。聊天、流媒体、嵌入、RAG和矢量搜索。没有Python ，没有HTTP微服务，没有Docker sidecar。
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: 100-days-of-ai
items.summary: Take the 100 Days of AI challenge - learn one AI concept a day, from machine learning basics to AI agents in production, in 100 days.
items.summary_cn: 参加100天的人工智能挑战-在100天内每天学习一个人工智能概念，从机器学习基础知识到生产中的人工智能代理。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation
items.title_cn: OpenCoF ：通过视频生成学习推理
items.summary: Reasoning has become a core capability for large models, especially when reliable decisions require understanding logical consequences. Recent video generation models offer a reasoning path distinct from previous Chain-of-Thought (CoT): reasoning can unfold through temporally connected frames, known...
items.summary_cn: 推理已成为大型模型的核心功能，特别是在可靠的决策需要理解逻辑结果时。最近的视频生成模型提供了一条与之前的思维链（ CoT ）不同的推理路径：推理可以通过时间连接的帧展开，已知...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation
items.title_cn: 创意有基因组：标杆科学谱系推理和基于谱系的创意生成
items.summary: Scientific ideas rarely start from a blank page. They inherit mechanisms, repair known limitations, and recombine pieces of earlier work, much like biological genomes. Current benchmarks still say little about whether AI systems can follow this inheritance structure. We present IdeaGene-Bench (IG-Be...
items.summary_cn: 科学思想很少从空白页开始。它们继承了机制，修复了已知的局限性，并重组了早期的工作，就像生物基因组一样。目前的基准测试仍然很少说明人工智能系统是否可以遵循这种继承结构。我们介绍IdeaGene-Bench （ IG-Be...
items.comment: 性能提升显著，能耗和成本呢？多维度权衡才是真实世界。

items.title: SLORR: Simple and Efficient In-Training Low-Rank Regularization
items.title_cn: SLORR ：简单高效的在线训练低排名正则化
items.summary: Low-rank factorization is widely used to compress neural networks, but modern models are often not naturally amenable to aggressive factorization without significant accuracy loss. Existing training-time low-rank regularizers can improve compressibility, but they often require SVDs of large weight m...
items.summary_cn: 低秩因子分解被广泛用于压缩神经网络，但现代模型通常不自然地适用于侵略性因子分解，而不会造成显著的准确性损失。现有的训练时间低秩正则化器可以提高可压缩性，但它们通常需要大重量m的SVD...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
items.title_cn: OpenAI表示，在分手喋喋不休的情况下， GPT 5.6是Microsoft Copilot 365的“首选型号”
items.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.
items.summary_cn: OpenAI的新系列模型将继续为微软的工作场所和生产力应用程序套件提供支持。
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
items.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.
items.summary_cn: OpenAI的二号高管菲吉·西莫（ Fidji Simo ）在病假时间超过预期后辞去了她的全职职务，这是一个领导层的真空，这是一个棘手的时刻，因为该公司正在寻找可能的首次公开募股机会，并竞相在企业市场上抓住Anthropic。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
items.title_cn: OpenAI推出带有GPT-5.6的新型号系列
items.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.
items.summary_cn: OpenAI最新的模型系列承诺在包括网络安全在内的一系列领域进行改进。
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，按 token 计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: AI-generated videos to maximally drive a target brain region
items.title_cn: 人工智能生成的视频，最大限度地驱动目标大脑区域

items.summary_cn: 人工智能生成的视频，最大限度地驱动目标大脑区域
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: Building a real-time AI tutor for 5-year-olds
items.title_cn: 为5岁儿童打造实时人工智能导师
items.summary: Hey HN! We've spent the good part of this past year building an AI tutor that teaches kids ages 4-9 reading, math, ESL and more. Getting an AI tutor to effectively teach a child turns out to be a really hard technical challenge, this took getting the underlying architecture right. Our tutor steers the UX in real-time and makes complex decisions on the fly. Doing both at conversation speed required us to replace the standard tool-use loop. We built our own tutor harness that utilizes a streaming
items.summary_cn: 嘿， HN ！我们在过去一年的大部分时间里建立了一个人工智能导师，教4-9岁的孩子阅读、数学、ESL等。让人工智能导师有效地教孩子是一个非常困难的技术挑战，这需要正确的基础架构。我们的导师实时引导用户体验，并即时做出复杂的决策。以对话速度进行两者都需要我们更换标准的工具使用循环。我们建立了自己的导师线束，利用流媒体
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。
